nasb.text: He also said, “Why then is my lord pursuing his servant? For what have I done? Or what evil is in my hand?

esv.text: And he said, “Why does my lord pursue after his servant? For what have I done? What evil is on my hands?

cnv.text: 又說：“我主為甚麼這樣追趕僕人呢？我作了甚麼？我手裡犯了甚麼過錯？

ccb.text: 我主为什么又要追杀仆人呢？我做错了什么，犯了什么罪？
